content.speakerText: Hey, sorry I'm late—traffic was insane!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，抱歉我迟到了，路上堵得要命！

options.text: You're always late! This is so annoying.
No worries, I get it—traffic’s a nightmare today.
I don't care if you're late or not.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了轻松、理解的语气，符合场景中缓解对方愧疚感的要求。选项1和4带有指责或冷漠语气，不符合友好道歉的语境；选项3是质问，会加剧对方的尴尬，不适合回应道歉。

content.speakerText: I really hate keeping you waiting—can I buy you coffee?
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的不想让你等，我请你喝咖啡吧？

options.text: Sure, a cappuccino with sugar, please!
You should just be on time next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案接受补偿提议并具体说明饮品，体现真诚和自然回应。选项2直接拒绝，缺乏礼貌缓冲；选项3是指责，违背了接受善意的语境；选项4拒绝补偿但未表达感谢，显得生硬。

content.speakerText: I'm so sorry I'm 20 minutes late—the highway was completely jammed!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常抱歉我迟到了20分钟，高速上完全堵死了！

options.text: It’s fine, but next time use a different route.
Don’t worry about it—I’ve been stuck in traffic too!
You’re always late. Can we just meet at 8 next time?
I’m not mad, but you owe me dinner.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了共情和理解，符合社交场景中缓和情绪的核心策略。选项1虽合理但带有建议指责意味；选项3是重复抱怨，破坏气氛；选项4提出物质补偿要求，过于功利，不符合朋友间自然的道歉回应。

content.template: No worries, I ___ it—traffic’s a nightmare today.
content.hint: 表达‘我理解’的常用口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：I get it（我明白/我理解）

content.template: That’s so nice of you—___ with oat milk, please!
content.hint: 咖啡店常见饮品，常用于具体回应补偿提议

content.template: I really hate ___ you waiting—can I buy you a drink?
content.hint: 表达‘让你等待’的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：keep someone waiting（让某人等待）

content.speakerText: Hey, sorry I'm late—traffic was insane!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，抱歉我迟到了，路上堵得要命！
expectedAnswers: No worries, I totally get it—traffic’s awful today.
It’s okay, everyone gets stuck sometimes.
Don’t stress, I’ve been stuck in traffic too—what took you so long?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了理解和宽容，而非责备
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否自然正确
表达自然度：是否符合朋友间轻松的口语风格
关键词覆盖：是否使用了traffic / late / sorry 等关键词

content.speakerText: I really hate keeping you waiting—can I buy you coffee?
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的不想让你等，我请你喝咖啡吧？
expectedAnswers: That’s so sweet! A flat white with almond milk, please.
Thanks, but you don’t have to—just be on time next time!
Sure, I’d love that! A black coffee is fine.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了补偿提议，不冷漠也不过度索取
语言准确性：是否正确使用了表达感谢和具体请求的结构
表达自然度：是否使用了符合口语习惯的短语（如 'that’s so sweet', 'don’t have to'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了buy you coffee / keep waiting / next time 等关键词

content.speakerText: I’m really sorry I’m late—I got caught in a huge accident on the freeway.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常抱歉我迟到了，我在高速上遇到了严重事故。
expectedAnswers: Oh no, are you okay? Thanks for letting me know—I appreciate you being honest.
No problem at all, accidents happen. Let’s just grab a seat and start.
That’s rough—I’ve been in that spot before. You didn’t miss much anyway.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达关心、理解或安慰，而非忽视或批评
语言准确性：语法结构是否完整，时态和用词是否恰当
表达自然度：是否使用了真实口语中的缓冲语（如 'oh no', 'that’s rough', 'anyway'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了sorry / late / accident / freeway 等场景关键词
